'''Thaere Privo''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] located within the [[Thaereian system]] of the [[Expansion Region/Legends|Expansion Region]]. The [[Galactic Senate/Legends|Galactic Senate]] tasked Thaere with protecting the [[Cularin system/Legends|Cularin system]] in a neighboring [[Sector/Legends|sector]]. Thaere joined the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]].

{{Planet-stub}}
